'''salatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xyloglucan|xyloglucan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xyloglucan|xyloglucan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| salatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sælæthæth|sælæthæth]] || [[word:sælæthæj|sælæthæj]] || [[word:sælæthæsh|sælæthæsh]] || [[word:sælæthæ|sælæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:salalathath|salalathath]] || [[word:salalathaj|salalathaj]] || [[word:salalathash|salalathash]] || [[word:salalatha|salalatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:salathath|salathath]] || [[word:salathaj|salathaj]] || [[word:salathash|salathash]] || [[word:salatha|salatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:salafthath|salafthath]] || [[word:salafthaj|salafthaj]] || [[word:salafthash|salafthash]] || [[word:salafthaf|salafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:salathatha|salathatha]] || [[word:salathaja|salathaja]] || [[word:salathasha|salathasha]] || [[word:salathaka|salathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:salathath|salathath]] || [[word:salathaj|salathaj]] || [[word:salathash|salathash]] || [[word:salatha|salatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:salathathal|salathathal]] || [[word:salathajal|salathajal]] || [[word:salathashal|salathashal]] || [[word:salathakal|salathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:salathathatha|salathathatha]] || [[word:salathajaja|salathajaja]] || [[word:salathashasha|salathashasha]] || [[word:salathaka|salathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:salathathan|salathathan]] || [[word:salathajan|salathajan]] || [[word:salathashan|salathashan]] || [[word:salathakan|salathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:salathathaoro|salathathaoro]] || [[word:salathajaoro|salathajaoro]] || [[word:salathashaoro|salathashaoro]] || [[word:salathakaoro|salathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
